things.name: Cape Coast Castle & Slave Dungeons
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage fortress where enslaved Africans passed through the Door of No Return

things.name: Kwame Nkrumah Memorial Park & Mausoleum
things.description: Memorial to Africa's greatest independence leader on the site where he declared independence

things.name: Makola Market
things.description: West Africa's most vibrant market with kente cloth, drums, shea butter and street food

things.name: National Museum of Ghana
things.description: Ghana's history from Akan kingdoms through the slave trade to independence

things.name: Labadi Beach (La Pleasure Beach)
things.description: Most popular beach in Accra with live music, dancing and fresh coconuts

things.name: Elmina Castle
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage oldest European building in sub-Saharan Africa, built by the Portuguese

things.name: Arts Centre (Centre for National Culture)
things.description: Wood carvers, kente weavers, jewellers and craftsmen at work and for sale

things.name: Aburi Botanical Gardens
things.description: 1890 botanical garden in the cool Akuapem Hills 35km from Accra

things.name: Teshie-Nungua Fantasy Coffin Makers
things.description: Unique Ghanaian tradition of being buried in a coffin shaped like your passion

things.name: Jollof Rice Rivalry
things.description: Try Ghana's jollof rice - superior to Nigeria's according to Ghanaians everywhere
